MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Eugene A. Vlahos, Esq. represented Plaintiff, John B. Vlahos and Defendant, Tyrone Anthony Carter appeared in pro per. The parties stipulated to strike the jury demand. The matter proceeds as a court trial.
